_comment: NULL CONTROL: a random direction, norm-matched per layer to refusal_s24, steered at the same coeff=5. refusal_s24 elicits up to 70% refusal at coeff=5, but its norm there is ~2x a typical activation -- so 'the direction causes refusal' and 'any shove this big breaks the model' predict the same curve. If random_s24 also elicits refusal, the effect is magnitude and the result collapses. If it stays at baseline, the effect is directional.
